Hello world!

hello world

This is the first file in my new Git Repo.

GitHub is the world's largest web-based platform for software development, offering hosting for Git version control, collaboration tools, and AI-powered features like Copilot.

It enables developers to store, manage, share, and contribute to code projects (repositories) efficiently while tracking all changes, acting as a social network for developers,

    Version Control & Collaboration:
    Key Components
    Open Source Hub
